title: Large Scale Image Segmentation with Structured Loss based on Partial Differential Equations
journal: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
abstract: We propose a structured loss based on MALIS that trains CNNs to produce affinity graphs optimized for downstream segmentation quality rather than pixel-level accuracy, enabling large-scale connectomics segmentation.
notes: Already in existing 102. Funke is first/corresponding; key segmentation methodologist at Janelia.
